title: a.out syntax error when 2D array is used.

features.name: 2D unpacked array with expression-based dimension in module port
features.description: Code should include a module declaration with a 2D unpacked array port where the packed dimension uses expression syntax (e.g., 16-1:0 instead of 15:0)

features.name: 2D unpacked array instantiation connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a 2D unpacked array signal is passed to a module port

features.name: 2D unpacked array indexing with shift operator
features.description: Code should include accessing a 2D unpacked array element and using it with a shift operator
